title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:unionDiscriminator
text:
Description:
Indicates that this field is the discriminator for a union.
Stability Level:
Stable
Arguments:
union
(string, optional): The name of the union, if more than one exists.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
TypeMeta
int
// +k8s:unionDiscriminator
D
D
`json:"d"`
// +k8s:unionMember
// +k8s:optional
M1
*
M1
`json:"m1"`
// +k8s:unionMember
// +k8s:optional
M2
*
M2
`json:"m2"`
}
type
D
string
const
(
DM1
D
=
"M1"
DM2
D
=
"M2"
)
type
M1
struct
{}
type
M2
struct
{}
In this example, the
Type
field is the discriminator for the union. The value of
Type
will determine which of the union members (
M1
or
M2
) is expected to be present.
